ui.quickQuizDesc: Answer to check understanding after the lesson.

pyf001.title: Can computers think?
pyf001.description: Understand that computers follow instructions and the Input - Process - Output model.
objectives: Understand that programming means giving clear instructions
Separate Input, Process and Output
Recognize programming in daily life

blocks.title: Computers do not guess
blocks.content: Computers are fast, but they do not understand human intention automatically. A program describes clear steps for the computer to follow.

blocks.title: Input - Process - Output
blocks.content: Input is data provided to a program. Process is the handling step. Output is the result. Example: enter 2 and 3, process addition, output 5.

blocks.title: Analyze a daily activity
blocks.content: Choose an activity such as making noodles or opening a learning app. Write its Input, Process and Output.

quiz.question: How do computers mainly work?

options.B: They follow clear instructions

quiz.explain: Computers need clear instructions; programming is how we write them.

project.title: Daily process description
project.description: Choose a familiar activity and describe it as Input, Process and Output.

pyf002.title: Your first Python program
pyf002.description: Get familiar with Python and print() for displaying information.
objectives: Understand the core concept of this lesson
Read and run a small Python example
Complete a short practice task independently

blocks.title: print() dùng để làm gì?
blocks.content: This lesson introduces a core Python concept. Focus on what problem it solves and when to use it.

blocks.title: Code example
blocks.code:
print("Hello")
print("Tôi đang học Python")

blocks.title: Practice
blocks.content: Apply the lesson by changing the example, running it and explaining the output in your own words.

quiz.question: What is the best way to learn this concept?

options.B: Run examples, change them, and explain the result

quiz.explain: Running, changing and explaining examples helps learners understand programming concepts deeply.

project.title: Giới thiệu bản thân
project.description: Complete a small task using the concept from this lesson and test it with at least two cases.

blocks.title: Code example
blocks.code:

    print("Đang cộng:", price, "Tổng:", total)
print(total)

pyf019.title: Basic file reading and writing
pyf019.description: Save data to files and read it back later.
objectives: Understand the core concept of this lesson
Read and run a small Python example
Complete a short practice task independently

blocks.title: Vì sao cần file?
blocks.content: This lesson introduces a core Python concept. Focus on what problem it solves and when to use it.

blocks.title: Code example
blocks.code:
with open("notes.txt", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write("Học Python")

with open("notes.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    content = f.read()
    print(content)
